options.content:
- Objective: Unified daily user activity view across HubSpot and Notion.
- Scope: Aggregates from the shared domain table user_activities.
- Tips: Use filters to focus on one source system or user cohort, then inspect the detail tables.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Activities"
FROM user_activities ua
WHERE $__timeFilter(ua.action_time)
  AND ua.source_system IN ('hubspot', 'notion')
  AND ('${source_system:raw}' = '__all' OR FIND_IN_SET(ua.source_system, REPLACE('${source_system:csv}', '\'', '')) > 0)
  AND ('${user_identity:raw}' = '__all' OR FIND_IN_SET(COALESCE(NULLIF(ua.user_email, ''), ua.account_id), REPLACE('${user_identity:csv}', '\'', '')) > 0)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(ua.user_email, ''), ua.account_id)) AS "Active Users"
FROM user_activities ua
WHERE $__timeFilter(ua.action_time)
  AND ua.source_system IN ('hubspot', 'notion')
  AND ('${source_system:raw}' = '__all' OR FIND_IN_SET(ua.source_system, REPLACE('${source_system:csv}', '\'', '')) > 0)
  AND ('${user_identity:raw}' = '__all' OR FIND_IN_SET(COALESCE(NULLIF(ua.user_email, ''), ua.account_id), REPLACE('${user_identity:csv}', '\'', '')) > 0)

SELECT ROUND(COUNT(*) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(ua.user_email, ''), ua.account_id)), 0), 2) AS "Activities Per Active User"
FROM user_activities ua
WHERE $__timeFilter(ua.action_time)
  AND ua.source_system IN ('hubspot', 'notion')
  AND ('${source_system:raw}' = '__all' OR FIND_IN_SET(ua.source_system, REPLACE('${source_system:csv}', '\'', '')) > 0)
  AND ('${user_identity:raw}' = '__all' OR FIND_IN_SET(COALESCE(NULLIF(ua.user_email, ''), ua.account_id), REPLACE('${user_identity:csv}', '\'', '')) > 0)

SELECT ROUND(COUNT(*) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT ua.action_day), 0), 2) AS "Avg Activities Per Day"
FROM user_activities ua
WHERE $__timeFilter(ua.action_time)
  AND ua.source_system IN ('hubspot', 'notion')
  AND ('${source_system:raw}' = '__all' OR FIND_IN_SET(ua.source_system, REPLACE('${source_system:csv}', '\'', '')) > 0)
  AND ('${user_identity:raw}' = '__all' OR FIND_IN_SET(COALESCE(NULLIF(ua.user_email, ''), ua.account_id), REPLACE('${user_identity:csv}', '\'', '')) > 0)

SELECT ua.action_day AS time,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ua.source_system = 'hubspot' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "HubSpot",
  SUM(CASE WHEN ua.source_system = 'notion' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Notion"
FROM user_activities ua
WHERE $__timeFilter(ua.action_time)
  AND ua.source_system IN ('hubspot', 'notion')
  AND ('${source_system:raw}' = '__all' OR FIND_IN_SET(ua.source_system, REPLACE('${source_system:csv}', '\'', '')) > 0)
  AND ('${user_identity:raw}' = '__all' OR FIND_IN_SET(COALESCE(NULLIF(ua.user_email, ''), ua.account_id), REPLACE('${user_identity:csv}', '\'', '')) > 0)
GROUP BY ua.action_day
ORDER BY 1

SELECT ua.action_day AS time,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ua.source_system = 'hubspot' THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(ua.user_email, ''), ua.account_id) END) AS "HubSpot Active Users",
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ua.source_system = 'notion' THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(ua.user_email, ''), ua.account_id) END) AS "Notion Active Users"
FROM user_activities ua
WHERE $__timeFilter(ua.action_time)
  AND ua.source_system IN ('hubspot', 'notion')
  AND ('${source_system:raw}' = '__all' OR FIND_IN_SET(ua.source_system, REPLACE('${source_system:csv}', '\'', '')) > 0)
  AND ('${user_identity:raw}' = '__all' OR FIND_IN_SET(COALESCE(NULLIF(ua.user_email, ''), ua.account_id), REPLACE('${user_identity:csv}', '\'', '')) > 0)
GROUP BY ua.action_day
ORDER BY 1

SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(ua.user_display, ''), NULLIF(ua.user_email, ''), ua.account_id) AS "User",
  COALESCE(NULLIF(ua.user_email, ''), ua.account_id) AS "User Key",
  COUNT(*) AS "Activities",
  COUNT(DISTINCT ua.action_day) AS "Active Days",
  COUNT(DISTINCT ua.object_ref) AS "Distinct Objects",
  SUM(CASE WHEN ua.source_system = 'hubspot' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "HubSpot",
  SUM(CASE WHEN ua.source_system = 'notion' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Notion"
FROM user_activities ua
WHERE $__timeFilter(ua.action_time)
  AND ua.source_system IN ('hubspot', 'notion')
  AND ('${source_system:raw}' = '__all' OR FIND_IN_SET(ua.source_system, REPLACE('${source_system:csv}', '\'', '')) > 0)
  AND ('${user_identity:raw}' = '__all' OR FIND_IN_SET(COALESCE(NULLIF(ua.user_email, ''), ua.account_id), REPLACE('${user_identity:csv}', '\'', '')) > 0)
GROUP BY "User", "User Key"
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 30

SELECT ua.action_day AS time,
  COUNT(*) AS "Activities",
  COUNT(DISTINCT ua.object_ref) AS "Distinct Objects"
FROM user_activities ua
WHERE $__timeFilter(ua.action_time)
  AND ua.source_system IN ('hubspot', 'notion')
  AND ('${source_system:raw}' = '__all' OR FIND_IN_SET(ua.source_system, REPLACE('${source_system:csv}', '\'', '')) > 0)
  AND ('${user_identity:raw}' = '__all' OR FIND_IN_SET(COALESCE(NULLIF(ua.user_email, ''), ua.account_id), REPLACE('${user_identity:csv}', '\'', '')) > 0)
GROUP BY ua.action_day
ORDER BY 1

SELECT CONCAT(ua.source_system, ':', ua.action_type) AS "Action",
  COUNT(*) AS "Activities"
FROM user_activities ua
WHERE $__timeFilter(ua.action_time)
  AND ua.source_system IN ('hubspot', 'notion')
  AND ('${source_system:raw}' = '__all' OR FIND_IN_SET(ua.source_system, REPLACE('${source_system:csv}', '\'', '')) > 0)
  AND ('${user_identity:raw}' = '__all' OR FIND_IN_SET(COALESCE(NULLIF(ua.user_email, ''), ua.account_id), REPLACE('${user_identity:csv}', '\'', '')) > 0)
GROUP BY CONCAT(ua.source_system, ':', ua.action_type)
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 12

SELECT ua.action_day AS "Day",
  COALESCE(NULLIF(ua.user_display, ''), NULLIF(ua.user_email, ''), ua.account_id) AS "User",
  ua.source_system AS "Source",
  ua.action_type AS "Action",
  COUNT(*) AS "Activities"
FROM user_activities ua
WHERE $__timeFilter(ua.action_time)
  AND ua.source_system IN ('hubspot', 'notion')
  AND ('${source_system:raw}' = '__all' OR FIND_IN_SET(ua.source_system, REPLACE('${source_system:csv}', '\'', '')) > 0)
  AND ('${user_identity:raw}' = '__all' OR FIND_IN_SET(COALESCE(NULLIF(ua.user_email, ''), ua.account_id), REPLACE('${user_identity:csv}', '\'', '')) > 0)
GROUP BY ua.action_day, COALESCE(NULLIF(ua.user_display, ''), NULLIF(ua.user_email, ''), ua.account_id), ua.source_system, ua.action_type
ORDER BY ua.action_day DESC, COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 200

SELECT ua.action_time AS "Action Time",
  COALESCE(NULLIF(ua.user_display, ''), NULLIF(ua.user_email, ''), ua.account_id) AS "User",
  ua.source_system AS "Source",
  ua.action_type AS "Action",
  ua.object_type AS "Object Type",
  ua.object_ref AS "Object Ref",
  ua.summary AS "Summary"
FROM user_activities ua
WHERE $__timeFilter(ua.action_time)
  AND ua.source_system IN ('hubspot', 'notion')
  AND ('${source_system:raw}' = '__all' OR FIND_IN_SET(ua.source_system, REPLACE('${source_system:csv}', '\'', '')) > 0)
  AND ('${user_identity:raw}' = '__all' OR FIND_IN_SET(COALESCE(NULLIF(ua.user_email, ''), ua.account_id), REPLACE('${user_identity:csv}', '\'', '')) > 0)
ORDER BY ua.action_time DESC
LIMIT 100

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT source_system FROM user_activities WHERE source_system IN ('hubspot', 'notion') ORDER BY 1
list.label: Source System
list.name: source_system
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT source_system FROM user_activities WHERE source_system IN ('hubspot', 'notion') ORDER BY 1

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(user_display, ''), NULLIF(user_email, ''), account_id) AS __text, COALESCE(NULLIF(user_email, ''), account_id) AS __value FROM user_activities WHERE source_system IN ('hubspot', 'notion') ORDER BY 1
list.label: User Identity
list.name: user_identity
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(ua.user_display, ''), NULLIF(ua.user_email, ''), ua.account_id) AS __text, COALESCE(NULLIF(ua.user_email, ''), ua.account_id) AS __value FROM user_activities ua WHERE ua.source_system IN ('hubspot', 'notion') AND ('${source_system:raw}' = '__all' OR FIND_IN_SET(ua.source_system, REPLACE('${source_system:csv}', '\'', '')) > 0) ORDER BY 1
